title: Elbaf Opens — Chapter 1129
main_description: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats. This chapter contains 5 structured story parts and 164 cleaned dialogue lines.
key_events: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
The display-ready parts preserve cleaned dialogue while uncertain speakers remain clearly marked.
